text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The race of my dreams is coming true! Doto's first
G1 with Opera O... My oshis are gonna run
together in a G1!!!!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I know full well a little classic-year pipsqueak like
me doesn't stand a chance! But still... Even if
that's true...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I'm getting the best seat in the house!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital throws herself to the ground and
grovels before taking on the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Here they are... in the flesh. I-I-I'm seeing them
with my own two eyes!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I've been waiting for this moment, Doto! ♪ Come
at me with everything you can muster!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I knew this would be a sacred event, but it's like all of my fantasies are coming true!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Which means today, I've got to run serious
enough to do my fantasies justice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Agnes Digital is going to show everyone
just how good she can make the other two look as
she runs.
